text: The surgical team utilizes five laparoscopic ports to perform the cystectomy, visible in the current image.
The laparoscopic view reveals significant fibrotic reaction around the bladder neck and prostate, likely resulting from previous radiotherapy treatment.
The surgeon removes the bladder and prostate adenoma, carefully preserving the entire prostate capsule and seminal vesicles.
The surgeon delimits and sections the ileal segment, using laparoscopic instruments to carefully cut and separate the segment from surrounding tissues.
